recording_steps.label: 1. Log in to your nation
recording_steps.narration: Start on the login page. Enter your nation name and password, then sign in.

recording_steps.label: 2. Country overview (population & stats)
recording_steps.narration: Your country page opens on the View tab. Here you see population, happiness, and core nation stats.

recording_steps.label: 3. Revenue tab — hourly tax & net gold
recording_steps.narration: Open the Revenue tab to see hourly production, costs, and net gold income.

recording_steps.label: 4. Game mechanics reference pages
recording_steps.narration: The mechanics pages explain rules in detail whenever you need a reference.

recording_steps.label: 1. Your province list
recording_steps.narration: The provinces page lists every province you own and lets you open each one.

recording_steps.label: 2. Open one province
recording_steps.narration: Open a province to manage its city, land, and buildings.

recording_steps.label: 3. Land tab — mines & industry slots
recording_steps.narration: On the Land tab you assign mines and prepare slots for industry buildings.

recording_steps.label: 4. Industry buildings (extractors)
recording_steps.narration: The Industry tab shows extractors that pull raw resources from the ground.

recording_steps.label: 1. Nation buildings summary
recording_steps.narration: On your country View tab you get a quick picture of national buildings and stockpiles.

recording_steps.label: 2. Revenue — resources produced per hour
recording_steps.narration: Revenue lists how much of each resource your economy produces every hour.

recording_steps.label: 3. Province land — raw material mines
recording_steps.narration: Province Industry buildings mine tier-one materials like iron, lumber, and bauxite.

recording_steps.label: 4. Processing — refineries & factories
recording_steps.narration: Processing buildings turn raw materials into steel, fuel, and other advanced goods.

recording_steps.label: 5. Resource mechanics guide
recording_steps.narration: The resource mechanics guide explains production chains and dependencies.

recording_steps.label: 1. Country overview
recording_steps.narration: Start on the country View tab for population and policy context.

recording_steps.label: 2. Revenue — gross production table
recording_steps.narration: Revenue shows gross production before upkeep and taxes are applied.

recording_steps.label: 3. Revenue — net gold after costs & tax
recording_steps.narration: Scroll down on Revenue to see net gold after building costs, rations, and coalition tax.

recording_steps.label: 4. Revenue mechanics explained
recording_steps.narration: The revenue mechanics page breaks down tax rates and income formulas.

recording_steps.label: 1. Population & demographics chart
recording_steps.narration: The demographics chart on View shows how your population is distributed by age.

recording_steps.label: 2. Revenue — rations consumed
recording_steps.narration: On Revenue you can see how many rations your people consume each hour.

recording_steps.label: 3. Rations & distribution rules
recording_steps.narration: The rations guide explains distribution capacity and shortages.

recording_steps.label: 1. Military — land units
recording_steps.narration: The military Land tab lists ground units you can train and deploy.

recording_steps.label: 2. Military — air units
recording_steps.narration: Switch to Air for fighters, bombers, and other aircraft.

recording_steps.label: 3. Military — naval units
recording_steps.narration: The Naval tab covers ships and maritime forces.

recording_steps.label: 1. Market — buy & sell offers
recording_steps.narration: The global market shows live buy and sell offers from every nation.

recording_steps.label: 2. Statistics — average prices
recording_steps.narration: Statistics help you compare average, high, and low prices before you trade.

recording_steps.label: 1. Economic upgrades
recording_steps.narration: Economic upgrades boost production, tax efficiency, and civilian capacity.

recording_steps.label: 2. Military upgrades
recording_steps.narration: Military upgrades improve unit stats and unlock advanced forces.

recording_steps.label: 1. Active wars & declarations
recording_steps.narration: The wars page lists active conflicts and declarations involving your nation.

recording_steps.label: 2. War mechanics — combat rules
recording_steps.narration: War mechanics explain how attacks, defenses, and casualties are calculated.

recording_steps.label: 1. Coalition directory
recording_steps.narration: Browse coalitions to find allies, banks, and shared diplomacy.

recording_steps.label: 2. Coalitions recruiting members
recording_steps.narration: Recruiting coalitions are actively looking for new members to join.
